summary: Implemented ADR 0241 from the isolated latest-origin/main worktree by shipping a Tiptap-backed rich notes editor in the Windmill operator access admin app, regenerating the raw-app metadata lock, hardening Windmill worker checkout replay for concurrent non-primary-worktree runs, and verifying governed note update plus restore end to end on docker-runtime-lv3.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_operator_manager.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py -q` returned `23 passed in 3.58s`, and `make syntax-check-windmill` passed after the worker checkout sync began dereferencing scoped-runner shard symlinks and the raw-app lockfile assertion was added.

verification.check: Raw-app metadata lock and bundle proof
verification.observed: `wmill generate-metadata f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app --base-url http://100.64.0.1:8005 --workspace lv3 --lock-only --skip-scripts --skip-flows --yes` regenerated `config/windmill/apps/wmill-lock.yaml` with `f/lv3/operator_access_admin.raw_app+__app_hash`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0241-app-summary.txt` recorded `has_update_notes_backend: true`, `has_tiptap: true`, `has_editor_content: true`, `has_task_list: true`, and `has_insert_table: true` for the live app payload.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0241-live-apply` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=231 changed=43 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`.

verification.check: Worker checkout mirrors the ADR 0241 worktree
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0241-worker-checkout-hashes.txt` showed `/srv/platform_server/scripts/operator_manager.py` at `8c48a528d200389ec106dad7ef99d59d5fb1ff6891aa957c3503cf4f4359a77d` and `/srv/platform_server/config/windmill/scripts/operator-update-notes.py` at `7937e0fe94600789f75d777241ec50bb0b87cf81eca04e1454a84a09d870e5a8`, matching source commit `f71c3b2e3d9fc5ba32f42dc8052e78419fbecbfa`, and confirmed `config/windmill/apps/wmill-lock.yaml` on the worker checkout.

verification.check: Governed operator note update and restore
verification.observed: A live `f/lv3/operator_update_notes` run updated operator `florin-badita` with the Tiptap-authored markdown, returning `changed: true`, `status: ok`, `note_length: 231`, and `roster_path: /srv/platform_server/config/operators.yaml`; a second live run restored the original note string with `note_length: 65` and the same governed mutation path.

notes: The first replay attempt failed because the raw app imported new Tiptap packages before `config/windmill/apps/wmill-lock.yaml` had been regenerated; the lockfile is now part of the ADR 0241 validation surface.

The next replay exposed two worker-sync issues during concurrent non-primary-worktree use: fixed guest-side filenames could race between runs, and the scoped-runner shard compatibility tree needed `tar --dereference` so the uploaded archive contained real worktree contents rather than top-level symlink stubs.

Protected mainline files remain intentionally untouched on this workstream branch; the follow-up merge-to-main step still needs to update `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, the top-level `README.md` integrated status summary, and `versions/stack.yaml`.
